testcase.classname: Home page redirects to /login when there is no session
testcase.name: Home page redirects to /login when there is no session

testcase.classname: Home page redirects to /dashboard when there is an active session
testcase.name: Home page redirects to /dashboard when there is an active session

testcase.classname: apiFetch prepends the API base URL to the request path
testcase.name: apiFetch prepends the API base URL to the request path

testcase.classname: apiFetch adds Authorization header when session has accessToken
testcase.name: apiFetch adds Authorization header when session has accessToken

testcase.classname: apiFetch omits Authorization header when no session
testcase.name: apiFetch omits Authorization header when no session

testcase.classname: apiFetch returns the raw response object
testcase.name: apiFetch returns the raw response object

testcase.classname: LoginPage production mode renders the sign-in button
testcase.name: LoginPage production mode renders the sign-in button

testcase.classname: LoginPage production mode calls signIn with 'azure-ad' provider and dashboard callbackUrl
testcase.name: LoginPage production mode calls signIn with 'azure-ad' provider and dashboard callbackUrl

testcase.classname: useTenant fetches tenant data from GET /api/v1/tenants/me
testcase.name: useTenant fetches tenant data from GET /api/v1/tenants/me

testcase.classname: useTenant returns the tenant object on success
testcase.name: useTenant returns the tenant object on success

testcase.classname: useTenant surfaces an error when the API call fails
testcase.name: useTenant surfaces an error when the API call fails
